scenario_title: Golden-records reload + re-read (high-risk user-visible with Detox-required synchronization)
runner_selection_rationale: DL-12 BOTH mode: this scenario has BOTH (a) user-visible acceptance value best proven by a readable black-box flow AND (b) Detox-required trigger #1 (RN synchronization/bridge timing after a background→foreground→reload cycle is load-bearing) + trigger #4 (precise waiting on RN state). Per the DL-12 conflict policy, neither Maestro-only nor Detox-only is valid: split into complementary Maestro (black_box_user_flow) + Detox (synchronization_control) coverage.

required_app_state.reset: deterministic relaunch via device.launchApp (Detox half) + clearState launch (Maestro half)

app_build_ref: apps/mobile built RN binary (pending-live: no build available in this env)
flake_policy_ref: DL-10/DL-12: deterministic failure hard-blocks; rerun is diagnostic only, never erases a prior failure; timing/sync flake triggers flaky-investigator, not a retry-until-green
evidence_consumer: verification runner / build / ship / I-23 end-to-end witness
//both-mode-split: coverage_intent array has ≥2 entries: black_box_user_flow (Maestro half) + synchronization_control (Detox half) — NOT a duplicate shallow smoke
